description: Comprehensive audio processing pipeline: eliminate time-stretching artifacts, add speaker diarization for voice matching, preserve background audio, and embed subtitles.

userStories.title: Create Audio Processing Module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a new audio_processing.py module with AudioSeparator and SpeakerDiarizer classes so that both translation scripts can share audio processing logic.
acceptanceCriteria: audio_processing.py file created in project root
AudioSeparator class with separate() and save_separated() methods
SpeakerDiarizer class with diarize(), get_speaker_segments(), and extract_speaker_samples() methods
Both classes handle errors gracefully with fallbacks
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 1 - audio_processing.py created with AudioSeparator and SpeakerDiarizer classes

userStories.title: Integrate Demucs for Audio Separation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the AudioSeparator class to use Demucs v4 to separate vocals from background audio.
acceptanceCriteria: demucs package added to requirements.txt and requirements-cloud.txt
AudioSeparator loads htdemucs model on initialization
separate() returns tuple of (vocals, background, sample_rate)
save_separated() writes vocals.wav and background.wav to output directory
Works on both GPU and CPU

userStories.title: Integrate pyannote.audio for Speaker Diarization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the SpeakerDiarizer class to identify different speakers in the audio.
acceptanceCriteria: diarize() returns list of segments with speaker labels and timestamps
get_speaker_segments() groups segments by speaker ID

userStories.title: Extract Per-Speaker Voice Samples
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extract clean voice samples for each identified speaker to use for voice cloning.
acceptanceCriteria: extract_speaker_samples() finds longest segment per speaker
Extracts 10-15 seconds of audio per speaker
Returns dict mapping speaker ID to sample file path
Handles case where speaker has <10s of audio (fallback to shorter sample)

userStories.title: Remove Time-Stretching from translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the librosa time-stretching code that causes echo/reverb artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: TTS audio plays at natural 1x speed
Segment start times adjusted to prevent overlap
Clips don't cut off words (next clip waits for current to finish)

userStories.title: Implement Multi-Speaker Synthesis in translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need synthesize_segments to use the correct voice sample for each speaker's segments.
acceptanceCriteria: Maps each text segment to its speaker via diarization timestamps
Uses speaker-specific voice sample for Chatterbox generation
Falls back to first available sample if speaker matching fails

userStories.title: Add Background Audio Mixing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to mix the translated speech with the original background audio.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses ffmpeg to mix speech (100% volume) with background (30% volume)
Output matches duration of speech track

userStories.title: Add Subtitle Generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to generate SRT subtitles from translated segments.
acceptanceCriteria: Converts segment timestamps to SRT format (HH:MM:SS,mmm)
Writes translated text for each segment

userStories.title: Embed Subtitles in Final Video
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to embed the generated subtitles as toggleable closed captions in the output video.
acceptanceCriteria: Update merge_audio_video() to accept subtitle_path parameter
Subtitles embedded as soft subs (toggleable, not burned in)
Uses mov_text codec for MP4 compatibility

userStories.title: Update translate.py Main Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate all audio processing components into the main translation pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Multi-speaker synthesis uses per-speaker voice samples
Background audio mixed with translated speech

userStories.title: Fix cloud_translate.py Whisper Timestamps
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to get segment timestamps from OpenAI Whisper API.
acceptanceCriteria: Change response_format from text to verbose_json
Parse response to extract segment start/end times
Return segments in same format as local transcribe_audio()

userStories.title: Fix cloud_translate.py Voice Cloning
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to pass voice samples to the Replicate Chatterbox API.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload voice sample to Supabase Storage
Get signed URL for voice sample
Pass audio_prompt parameter to Replicate API

userStories.title: Add Audio Separation to cloud_translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to separate vocals from background.
acceptanceCriteria: Store vocals.wav and background.wav in job directory

userStories.title: Add Speaker Diarization to cloud_translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to identify speakers for voice matching.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload voice samples to Supabase Storage for Replicate API

userStories.title: Add Multi-Speaker Synthesis to cloud_translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to synthesize with speaker-matched voices.
acceptanceCriteria: Match each segment to speaker via diarization
Use correct voice sample URL for each segment
Call Replicate API with per-segment voice

userStories.title: Add Background Mixing and Subtitles to cloud_translate.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cloud_translate.py to mix background audio and embed subtitles.
acceptanceCriteria: Mix translated speech with original background
Generate SRT subtitles from translated segments
Update job status and output path

userStories.title: Update Requirements Files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to add new dependencies to requirements files.

userStories.title: End-to-End Testing - Local
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the complete local translation pipeline works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Translate a video with male and female speakers
Verify different voices used for different speakers
Verify background music is preserved at lower volume
Verify subtitles can be toggled on/off in VLC
Verify no echo/reverb artifacts in output audio

userStories.title: End-to-End Testing - Cloud
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the complete cloud translation pipeline works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
